zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Alice Fitton於大約1398年出生在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Lawrence Fitton24歲，母親Lady Agnes Hesketh25歲。她於1418年與Sir Robert de Davenport在英國爾加福斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1478年在她的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Alice Fitton于大约1398年出生在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Lawrence Fitton24岁，母亲Lady Agnes Hesketh25岁。她于1418年与Sir Robert de Davenport在英国爾加福斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1478年在她的家乡享年81岁，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Alice Fitton was born about 1398, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Lawrence Fitton, was 24 and her mother, Lady Agnes Hesketh, was 25. She married Sir Robert de Davenport in 1418, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1478, in her hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Alice Fitton est née environ 1398, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Lawrence Fitton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Hesketh, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Davenport en 1418, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Alice Fitton um 1398 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Lawrence Fitton 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Hesketh 25. Sie hat 1418 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England Sir Robert de Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1478 im Alter von 81 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Alice Fitton è nata il circa 1398 nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Lawrence Fitton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Hesketh, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Davenport nel 1418, nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1478, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Alice Fittonが約1398年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Lawrence Fittonは24歳，母Lady Agnes Heskethは25歳であった。1418年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスでSir Robert de Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1478年に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Alice Fitton(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Fitton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Hesketh(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1418년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 Sir Robert de Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 그녀의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Alice Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Lawrence Fitton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Hesketh, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Davenport em 1418, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Alice Fitton родилась около 1398 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Fitton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Hesketh, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Davenport в 1418 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1478 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Alice Fitton nació aproximadamente 1398, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Lawrence Fitton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Hesketh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Davenport en 1418, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1478, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
